  <entry>
    <id>tag:github.com,2008:Repository/633927609/0.121.18</id>
    <updated>2026-07-08T12:22:39Z</updated>
    <link rel="alternate" type="text/html" href="https://github.com/promptfoo/promptfoo/releases/tag/0.121.18"/>
    <title>0.121.18</title>
    <content type="html"><h2><a href="https://github.com/promptfoo/promptfoo/compare/0.121.17...0.121.18">0.121.18</a> (2026-07-07)</h2>
<h3>Features</h3>
<ul>
<li>add Node.js 20 support cutoff campaign (<a href="https://github.com/promptfoo/promptfoo/issues/9862" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/promptfoo/promptfoo/pull/9862/hovercard">#9862</a>) (<a href="https://github.com/promptfoo/promptfoo/commit/d4d35da347358af9040c69e7e6003c7a9f0eac26">d4d35da</a>)</li>
<li>add per-test repeat option (<a href="https://github.com/promptfoo/promptfoo/issues/9781" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/promptfoo/promptfoo/pull/9781/hovercard">#9781</a>) (<a href="https://github.com/promptfoo/promptfoo/commit/3e1f02bc192d26076e00bbe7133c340d95003308">3e1f02b</a>)</li>
<li><strong>app:</strong> surface websocket subprotocols (<a href="https://github.com/promptfoo/promptfoo/issues/9947" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/promptfoo/promptfoo/pull/9947/hovercard">#9947</a>) (<a href="https://github.com/promptfoo/promptfoo/commit/88c7445fee7b0d611b48570e14f816c2d93c107c">88c7445</a>)</li>
<li><strong>config:</strong> add YAML source location to prompt reference errors (<a href="https://github.com/promptfoo/promptfoo/issues/9940" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/promptfoo/promptfoo/pull/9940/hovercard">#9940</a>) (<a href="https://github.com/promptfoo/promptfoo/commit/5f13e7672e730b5eb0033f4bac3c7f6228a1f647">5f13e76</a>)</li>
<li><strong>providers:</strong> add Bedrock support for Grok 4.3, GLM, MiniMax, Kimi, Nemotron, Gemma, Palmyra (<a href="https://github.com/promptfoo/promptfoo/issues/9788" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/promptfoo/promptfoo/pull/9788/hovercard">#9788</a>) (<a href="https://github.com/promptfoo/promptfoo/commit/84a274b5a5fa416065eb7ba3236b47b3de6e8799">84a274b</a>)</li>
<li><strong>providers:</strong> add Claude Sonnet 5 support across Anthropic, Bedrock, Vertex, and Azure (<a href="https://github.com/promptfoo/promptfoo/issues/9924" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/promptfoo/promptfoo/pull/9924/hovercard">#9924</a>) (<a href="https://github.com/promptfoo/promptfoo/commit/3ea1e7130f3655f5764a366f845ca5f78821a104">3ea1e71</a>)</li>
<li><strong>providers:</strong> add GPT-5.6 preview support (<a href="https://github.com/promptfoo/promptfoo/issues/9893" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/promptfoo/promptfoo/pull/9893/hovercard">#9893</a>) (<a href="https://github.com/promptfoo/promptfoo/commit/853710faf786ff2f9ec90aea87dcec3373b3d950">853710f</a>)</li>
<li><strong>pro
